description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular layout, featuring a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The exterior walls are primarily light gray with large windows and a paved driveway leading to a garage. The house includes a central courtyard with greenery and a palm tree, visible from multiple rooms, and a backyard with a small lawn and outdoor seating area. The interior is divided into several rooms, including a living area, dining space, kitchen, bedrooms, and bathrooms, all arranged around the central courtyard. The front of the house has a paved entryway with a car parked outside and a small landscaped area with a tree. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and functional living areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, central courtyard, and a mix of open and enclosed living spaces, featuring large windows and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: This view shows the front of the house with the driveway, garage, main entryway, and a landscaped area with a tree.
description_view_1: This view highlights the central courtyard with a palm tree, surrounded by rooms and visible open spaces.
description_view_2: This view displays the backyard with a small lawn, outdoor seating, and the rear facade of the house.
description_view_3: This view presents the garage, driveway, and the main entrance, along with the front landscaping and parked cars.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved steps, and a small landscaped area with a tree; no porch or columns.
